caption: A man with a shaved head and a full dark beard is recording in a studio with grey acoustic foam panels in the background. He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt that features a black graphic logo with the text "Salty Authentic" and "NEW YORK" written below it. A professional silver condenser microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Across the sequence, the man looks toward someone or something off-camera to his right. He begins with a slight smile, his mouth closed, and gradually opens his mouth as he begins to speak, shifting his facial expression from a smile to a more active speaking posture. His posture remains relatively still while his facial movements evolve throughout the clip.
